T0003.title: Bulk Arbitrage Flip
T0003.definition: A large-scale fraudulent scheme where coupon hunters exploit high-value promotions or pricing errors on e-commerce platforms to buy goods at extremely low prices for resale and profit.
T0003.description: Operators closely monitor platform promotional rule flaws and use automated scripts to instantly purchase large quantities of heavily discounted goods, hoarding them for resale at a markup through second-hand channels. This activity not only deprives legitimate consumers of benefits but can directly bankrupt merchants due to catastrophic financial losses, serving as a core profit-generating method for professional coupon hunters.
